posts.author: julietwrites (Juliet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Film and television projects involve writers, producers, directors, crew, editors, and marketing teams all working in sync. Monday.com already thrives as a collaboration hub, but the film industry has very specific needs such as script revisions, production schedules, shot lists, call sheets, edit timelines, that generic boards don’t fully address. Filmmaking boards would give production teams ready-to-use templates instead of building them from scratch.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to show them there’s demand for project boards tailored to filmmakers (screenwriters, producers, editors, students, indie teams). Right now, most film teams patch together spreadsheets, email, and expensive niche software. If Monday.com steps in, they could capture a huge creative user base.
